content.title: Pier Confession
content.logline: Mira corners Rowan at the pier and records his confession.
content.opening_hook: Mira waits at the pier with the recorder already running.
content.main_conflict: Mira must confront Rowan before he can destroy the recording.
content.emotional_payoff: Mira hears the confession she risked everything to capture.
content.cliffhanger: Rowan says the real order came from someone above him.

beats.summary: Mira corners Rowan at the pier and records his confession.

elements.text: Mira starts the recorder as Rowan faces her on the pier.
Your confession is already on this recorder.
